user.title: Connect to Eloverblik
user.description: Use a Token and Metering Point ID from eloverblik.dk (API access).

error.empty_field: Token and Metering Point ID cannot be empty.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Eloverblik or metering point returned an error. Check ID and try again.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests (429). Wait a minute and try again.
error.datahub_unavailable: DataHub / Eloverblik is temporarily unavailable (503). Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This metering point is already configured
